remarks: Oversized and updated one bedroom, one bathroom in beautifully manicured complex- minutes to highways, shops, train, and nightlife! Gourmet eat in kitchen w/ high end appliances- stove, dishwasher, microwave, sunfilled living area w/ walls of glass, large master bedroom suite w/ double closet, modern bathroom, air conditioning, laundry on site, off st parking. Pets welcome!
